name: brackets: nested brackets remain intact in editor value as depth grows (rainbow content guard)
comment: Rainbow depth COLORS are painted as NSLayoutManager temporary attributes and are NOT readable through AXValue — autopilot cannot assert glyph color. What we CAN guarantee is the render-regression invariant: after typing deeply nested brackets, the text content is still fully present and undamaged by the colorizer's temp-attribute passes. Auto-close is on, so we paste a known nested string via setValue (no per-key auto-close interference) and assert exact content. Color verification stays a manual/visual check (see docs/testplans/README.md).
